series_metadata.series_description: Records used to transfer or increase appropriations/allotments between accounts at the level in OAKS of the fiscal year if they are within the same appropriation line item of an appropriation bill.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: next audit by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved ; Electronic: next audit by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved
